introduce:
This website is my first step to shine like a star.
Not just receiving light, but giving it.
aboutTitle: Hi, I'm syan aspiring to be a developer!
aboutText: This is my first personal project.
recordText:
I was interested in programming since middle school.
I entered college and studied C and Java.
Then decided to create this website before joining the army.

1.text: I first developed an interest in programming.

2.text: My interest in programming grew as I learned the C language.

3.year: Second Year, First Semester of University
3.text: A certain experience sparked my interest in web and app development, so I began learning HTML and Java.

4.text: I worked on my very first personal web project.

Ending: Thank you for visiting my website. I sincerely wish you only good things in the future.
